calendar.matters:
Petition To Enforce Oral Contract To Make A Trust; For Determination That Trust Instruments Are Void Due To Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fina

Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Continued To Aug-08-19 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Enforce Oral Contract To Make A Trust; For Determination That Trust Instruments Are Void Due To Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fina
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Woodford Rowland appeared by telephone for Petitioners.
Daniel Kim appeared by telephone Gregory Pera (Respondent).

The Court noted that there are several issues, that a hearing date of June 27th has been reserved for a motion for judgment on the pleadings, informed Counsel that they will not get a trial date until the Court knows the matter is ready for trial and that holding off on discovery is not viable. Mr. Rowland and Mr. Kim indicated that they are ready to go to private mediation. Mr. Kim stated that they will not get mediation done by the June 27th hearing date, that once the motion is heard it will narrow down the issues and that they will then schedule mediation. The Court pointed out that the petition still does not have a proper proof of service with adequate notice. The Court anticipates that the parties will advise the Court in advance of the hearing if the matter gets resolved. If not, the parties are to meet and confer and resolve all issues concerning a run up towards trial. The Court informed Counsel that if the matter is not resolved, it will set discovery cut off dates at the next hearing. The Petition to Enforce Oral Contract to Make a Trust, etc. is continued to August 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Enforce Oral Contract To Make A Trust; For Determination That Trust Instruments Are Void Due To Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fina
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Woodford Rowland for John Pera and Linda Pera (Petitioners).
Daniel Kim for Greg Pera (Respondent).

Mr. Kim stated that he plans to file dispositive motions, that he has one last round of clean up written discovery that he needs to do and requested that the matter be set for trial. Mr. Rowland also stated that he would like to see the matter set for trial. The Court informed Counsel that it will not set a trial at this time, stated that discovery needs to be completed and motions need to be heard, and that the matter is not ready yet. Mr. Kim spoke of continuing the matter to discuss if settlement is possible. Mr. Rowland stated that he is in a different position. Mr. Kim stated that he sent a letter to meet and confer and that he has not received a response yet. The Court encourages Counsel to communicate. The Petition to Enforce Oral Contract to Make a Trust, etc. is continued to May 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to have completed discovery, that all dispositive motions are filed, and that they meet and confer as to how they are going to proceed and whether they will consider mediation. A joint status statement is to be filed by May 15, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Enforce Oral Contract To Make A Trust; For Determination That Trust Instruments Are Void Due To Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fina
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Continued To Mar-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Woodford Rowland appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Gary Rothstein for Gregory Pera (Trustee/Objector).

Mr. Rowland stated that since August 29th document discovery is completed, that they received significant documents on October 31st, that he put out feelers to arrange depositions and a that a key person is not available for a deposition on certain days in January. Mr. Rowland also stated that if the parties are willing to pursue mediation, they can do it in February. Mr. Rothstein stated that he may need to do depositions depending on what he sees and suggested a three month continuance. The Petition to Enforce Oral Contract to Make a Trust, etc. is continued to March 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel are to file a joint status report by March 6, 2019. If the case hasn't been resolved, the Parties are to have met and conferred as to what needs to be done, setting for a final hearing and what the hearing will involve.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

Petition To Enforce Oral Contract To Make A Trust; For Determination That Trust Instruments Are Void Due To Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fina
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Continued To Dec-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Woodford Rowland for Petitioner.
Gary Rothstein for and with Gregory Pera (Trustee).

Mr. Rowland stated that they have not spoken, that he has made some discovery requests, that depositions need to be taken and that they need three or four months. Mr. Rothstein stated that he agrees with the time frame and that he needs to evaluate if he will need to do some discovery as well. The Petition to Enforce Oral Contract to Make a Trust, etc. is continued to December 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects discovery to be done, and for the Parties to meet and confer as to how to move forward, mediation and what the end game is.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
